arts.ttl: Why Hall got a Fantasy assist for Isak's goal against Leicester
arts.sum: "If an opposing player deflects the ball after the final pass before a goal is scored, significantly altering the intended destination of the ball, then no assist in Fantasy is awarded." Fantasy Premier League and Stats Perform identified Brentford forward Yoane Wissa as the intended target, and therefore Mbeumo was not awarded the assist.

arts.ttl: Newcastle 'deal agreed' truth would throw spanner in works of January plan
arts.sum: With Pope out injured for around a month and Dubravka potentially heading for the exit door, does Howe seek another stopper next month despite those aforementioned priorities in other areas of the pitch? Howe kept his cards close to his chest on Tuesday morning, speaking ahead of Wednesday's cup encounter with Brentford, but should the Saudi deal prove true, it leaves Newcastle with a fresh question to answer next month.

arts.ttl: Howe ‘desperately’ wants Newcastle to win Carabao Cup and end fans’ wait
arts.sum: Brentford tie ‘pivotal’ to club’s season, Howe says Newcastle host quarter-final on Wednesday night Eddie Howe accepts Newcastle’s season could hinge on their Carabao Cup quarter-final against Brentford oon Wednesday night. “I feel we can still grab the season and be very successful,” Howe said. “But games like this become pivotal to that. We can achieve great things but, likewise, the opposite can happen if we don’t have the right attitude to this game.” Lifting the Carabao Cup would make Howe – a losing finalist against Manchester United in 2023 – the first English manager to secure the trophy since Steve McClaren at Middlesbrough in 2004. “That’s not so much in my thoughts,” he said. “It’s for Newcastle, trying to end this club’s wait for a trophy is the burning desire.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United reveal deal truth after rule 'changes' as rivals make themselves clear
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has admitted that it will be 'very difficult' for Newcastle United to sign players on loan next month because 'not many clubs' want to help the Magpies. Going back further, Joe Willock proved a transformative loan signing in January, 2021 but much has changed since those days in the Ashley era when Arsenal did not consider relegation-threatened Newcastle to be a club with big long-term ambitions.

arts.ttl: PIF using Newcastle United as a 'smokescreen' for new takeover plan masterminded by Amanda Staveley
Five players for your Fantasy team this week
arts.sum: Gameweek 17 features some exciting Premier League clashes and Tom Hill has picked out five players to include in your Fantasy Football team.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United star banned for Brentford game as Eddie Howe deals with two suspensions
arts.sum: Howe is without Sean Longstaff tomorrow after the North Shields midfielder reached the limit on cautions in the Carabao Cup. And United must also face up to life without Joelinton at Ipswich Town at the weekend after he reached the five-card tipping point in the Premier League. Howe said today: "It is slightly strange with how the booking system works now - so yes, we lose Sean [for Brentford] and then we lose Joelinton [for Ipswich].

arts.ttl: Sources: How Newcastle United actually feel about selling Sandro Tonali with three clubs interested
arts.sum: When Sandro Tonali returned from his ban at Newcastle United this season, many of the club supporters expected the midfielder to explode under Eddie Howe....

arts.ttl: Brentford's blueprint to success helping Frank thrive
arts.sum: Ethan Pinnock, Ben Mee, Yehor Yarmoliuk, Christian Norgaard, the defensive unit as a whole, Fabio Carvalho, Igor Thiago, Kevin Schade and Mikkel Damsgaard.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United January loan decision confirmed as Eddie Howe blocks EFL bids
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has made it clear that Lewis Miley will be going nowhere in the January transfer window - despite struggling for game time this term. Miley has been plying his trade in the reserve team for the last couple of weeks and played 45 minutes in the 3-2 win over Chelsea' second string on Monday night at Whitley Park.
